_comment: JP-exclusive parallel variants (Championship promos, event prizes, etc.) that en.onepiece-cardgame.com does not list. Each entry is an alt-art parallel of an existing card; we inherit name/colors/cost/power/etc from the base row at import time. Suffix convention: _jpN for the Nth JP-exclusive variant of a given base, chosen so it never collides with the site's own _pN / _rN parallels. See scripts/import-jp-exclusives.js for the import logic.
